# Curriculum: [Title]

## Goal
Define a curriculum concept for NIOS OBE Level A/B/C.

---

## Concept ID
Unique identifier (e.g., `counting-1-10`, `addition-within-20`).

---

## Learning Objective
What the learner should achieve. (e.g., "Count objects from 1 to 10 with one-to-one correspondence.")

---

## Core Idea
The key understanding the learner should build.

---

## Examples
Concrete, visual examples appropriate for ASD learners.

---

## Misconceptions
Common mistakes or misunderstandings to anticipate.

---

## Supports Required
- [ ] Visual supports
- [ ] Audio supports
- [ ] Prompting strategies

---

## Mastery Criteria
Required mastery threshold. (e.g., "3 of 4 correct across two consecutive sessions")

---

## Dependencies
Prerequisite concepts.

---

## Deliverables
- Concept definition in `packages/db/prisma/seed.ts`
- Activity configurations for supported activity types

---

## Acceptance Criteria
- Concept validates against the curriculum schema
- Properly linked in the concept dependency graph
- Seed data populates correctly

---

- Parent Epic / Story: #
